slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

persistence.note: single frozen store; slice introduces no new persistence component — adds one additive scalar field to the existing project record (A14)

slice_entities.name: Tag
slice_entities.representation: Free-text string `label` field on the existing project record (E2). NOT a separate table/relation (A14). At most one label per project (A15).

relationships.basis: Each project carries at most one label as an additive scalar field on its own record; A14/A15.

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: C3 (extended) owns E8 as an additive label field on E2 via the CT2 extension (shared_data C3→C1 read-write); sole writer confirmed

slice_entities.name: Client Project

relationships.basis: The project record gains one additive label field (E8); base E2 schema (S4) unchanged.

slice_entities.in_scope_basis: E2 base schema established in S4 (frozen); this slice adds only the additive label field, base fields untouched
